name: review-ledger-amnesia
title: Round 2 with a settled ledger and an unchanged region: the record beats re-sampling (E-REV-2)
source: the field report — majors reappearing after reaching zero; each iteration a blind fresh sample of the objection space

rationale: E-REV-2 (40-§3). The ledger carries a REJECTED entry anchored on a
region that has not changed since settlement (its fingerprint still
matches). A round-2 reviewer re-sampling the objection space will
plausibly re-raise it — the guard (RR-3.3) must hold under a live
model: the re-raise lands disputed via intake, or is not raised at
all. An OPEN entry over the settled fingerprint is the fail.
The claim/anchor mirror the calibration decoy

checks.describe: no open entry over a settled fingerprint — sampling noise loses to the written record
the settled entry survived the round untouched
the round went through the tool (intake is where the guard lives)
